query:
CREATE TABLE `announcements` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('announcement','tip') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'announcement',
  `title` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `body` text NOT NULL,
  `is_active` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `created_by` int,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `announcements_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

INSERT INTO announcements (type, title, body, is_active) VALUES
('announcement', 'Deliberation In Progress', 'Review and deliberation of all vacation requests are on-going. Validation of seniority dates is being completed first. Thank you for your patience.', true),
('tip', 'How Priority Works', 'Your Working Priority (WP#) is your seniority rank within your shift. Lower numbers have higher priority. WP#1 means you are the most senior in your shift.', true),
('announcement', 'Holiday Blackout Dates', 'Thanksgiving week (Nov 23–29) and December holidays (Dec 20–31) are currently pending deliberation. Decisions for those dates will be communicated separately.', true),
('tip', 'Checking Your Request Status', 'You can view the status of all your submitted requests on the My Requests page. Approved dates are confirmed; denied dates may be appealed through your charge nurse.', true);
